ddls:
CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* The version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes or features in this version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was last updated */,
  "git_branch" TEXT /* The Git branch associated with this version */,
  "model_size_mb" REAL /* The size of the model in megabytes */,
  "training_time_minutes" INTEGER /* The time taken to train the model in minutes */,
  "validation_accuracy" REAL /* The accuracy on the validation set */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used for training the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project this model belongs to */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose or application of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "input_features" TEXT /* Input features used by the model */,
  "output_features" TEXT /* Output features produced by the model */,
  "model_complexity" INTEGER /* Measure of the model's complexity (e.g., number of parameters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is the project manager */,
  "budget" REAL /* The budget allocated for the project */,
  "expected_completion_date" TEXT /* The expected completion date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model version this metric belongs to */,
  "false_positive" REAL /* False Positive Rate */,
  "true_positive" REAL /* True Positive Rate */,
  "thresholds" INTEGER /* Threshold value used for the metric calculation */,
  "auc" REAL /* Area Under the Curve (AUC) */,
  "cohens_kappa" REAL /* Cohen's Kappa statistic */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision metric */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall metric */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 Score metric */,
  "roc_auc" REAL /* ROC AUC metric */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* Confusion matrix */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_thresholds FOREIGN KEY ("thresholds") REFERENCES thresholds ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "threshold_value" INTEGER /* The value of the threshold */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the purpose or application of this threshold */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric the threshold is used for (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "default_value" INTEGER /* Default value of the threshold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project this dataset belongs to */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_size_mb" REAL /* The size of the dataset in megabytes */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* The format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., structured, unstructured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model evaluation */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model version being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "performance_metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric record for this evaluation */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., cross-validation, holdout) */,
  "evaluation_method" TEXT /* Method used for evaluation (e.g., k-fold, train-test split) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_performance_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., researcher, developer) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team this user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user is an admin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project this team is working on */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is the team lead */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of members in the team */,
  "team_location" TEXT /* Location of the team (e.g., office, remote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model version this contribution belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the contribution */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date when the contribution was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contribution */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., code, documentation) */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the contribution on the model (e.g., significant, minor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_contributions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_contributions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_control" (
  "version_control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version control entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model version this entry belongs to */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Unique hash for the commit */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message describing the changes in the commit */,
  "committed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the commit */,
  "committed_date" TEXT /* Date when the commit was made */,
  "branch" TEXT /* The Git branch associated with the commit */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the commit */,
  "merge_request_id" TEXT /* Reference to the merge request if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_control_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_control_committed_by FOREIGN KEY ("committed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model version this report is about */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation that resulted in this report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the stored report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, comparison) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "file_size_kb" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in kilobytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES model_evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model version this issue belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who reported the issue */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was reported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* Reference to the user assigned to resolve the issue */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  "resolution_details" TEXT /* Details of the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_issues_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_issues_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_issues_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
